limitations: ai_investment_intensity: No quantified AI-specific capex or dedicated AI budget disclosed in excerpts; MPWR is a semiconductor supplier to AI infrastructure rather than a direct AI infrastructure investor — R&D investment mentioned generically without AI-specific dollar amounts.

ai_narrative_concreteness: AI use cases described at product-category level (DC-DC converters for AI systems) with revenue mix data, but no deployment metrics or quantified business outcomes from AI-specific products; revenue percentages reflect end-market mix, not AI product performance.

ai_risk_disclosure_depth: Risk section is present and contains named, company-specific AI risk scenarios (regulatory compliance, unauthorized employee use of AI tools, IP exposure, export restrictions on AI-enabling products) with mechanisms described, warranting score 4; no quantified risk exposure or named governance body found in excerpts.
